title: Darthome Set of 6 Tuscany Pasta Bowls Fine China Mediterranean Food Kitchen Tableware
features: Dimensions: W22cm x H6cm x D22cm
Vibrant Colours: Assorted shades of red, yellow, and green add a pop of colour to your table setting.
Features: Dishwasher Safe, Microwave Safe, Set Of 6, Mediterranean Theme, Tuscany Design, Assorted, Embossed Pattern, Green, Red, Yellow, Pasta Bowls
description: Bring the vibrant colours and rustic charm of the Mediterranean to your dining table with this set of six fine china pasta bowls. Crafted with care, these 22cm diameter bowls feature an assortment of classic Tuscany-inspired designs in red, yellow, and green hues, capturing the essence of the Italian countryside. Microwave and dishwasher safe, these durable bowls are perfect for serving hearty pasta dishes or savoury soups. With a weight of 700g, they offer a substantial yet elegant presence on your table. Dimensions: W22cm x H6cm x D22cm. Elevate your dining experience with this delightful set of pasta bowls that blend functionality and Mediterranean flair.
